summary: 4/6 in-VPC probe rows green. Both prior probe-side residuals (verify_email_clickthrough, password_reset_clickthrough) now pass on the deployed merged-main SHA. The merged s1_dunning_reset_stripe_json_fix cleared the original reset_stripe_list_invalid blocker: the dunning rehearsal reset_test_state, preflight, metering_evidence and live_mutation_guard steps now pass. The two dunning rows now fail one step later, at email-evidence capture, blocked by a staging instance-role IAM gap (logs:FilterLogEvents denied on the SES send-events log group).

failures.observed_detail: CloudWatch Logs SES send-events query failed while checking invoice email evidence. (attempts=1). Reset/preflight/metering/live_mutation_guard all passed; failure is at live_mutation_attempt email-evidence capture.
failures.root_cause: Staging EC2 instance role arn:aws:iam::213880904778:role/fjcloud-instance-role is not authorized to perform logs:FilterLogEvents / logs:DescribeLogGroups on log-group /fjcloud/staging/ses/send-events. ops/iam/fjcloud-instance-role.tf grants only CloudWatch Logs write actions (CreateLogGroup, CreateLogStream, DescribeLogStreams, PutLogEvents), never read/query actions. The on-host billing rehearsal email-evidence step (scripts/lib/staging_billing_rehearsal_email_evidence.sh::run_ses_cloudwatch_logs_lookup) requires logs:FilterLogEvents. The log group itself exists and is populated (verified operator-side: 8088216 stored bytes, 14-day retention).
failures.disposition: P1 repo-owned-prerequisite infra gap. Fix owner: ops/iam/fjcloud-instance-role.tf (add a read policy granting logs:FilterLogEvents + logs:DescribeLogGroups + logs:GetLogEvents on arn:aws:logs:*:*:log-group:/fjcloud/staging/ses/send-events:*), then terraform apply staging. Out of scope for this verify-only stage (no product/infra code changes); tracked for an ops/IAM follow-up stage. The email SEND itself is not implicated (ses:SendEmail/SendRawEmail are granted); only the on-host evidence QUERY is IAM-blocked.
failures.progress_vs_reference: Reference bundle 20260711T221212Z failed at reset_test_state with reset_stripe_list_invalid (Stripe invoice list returned invalid JSON). That blocker is now cleared; this row advances through metering and live mutation and fails at a distinct, newly-surfaced IAM gate.

failures.observed_detail: dunning owner script exited 1 (wraps scripts/validate_staging_dunning_delivery.sh). Inbox hosted-invoice-URL assertion was never reached because the validator did not return result=passed.
failures.root_cause: Dependent on staging_dunning_delivery. Same underlying instance-role IAM gap (logs:FilterLogEvents denied) blocks the wrapped validator from passing, so the inbox hosted-invoice-URL check does not run.
failures.disposition: P1 dependent gap. Clears automatically once staging_dunning_delivery clears (i.e. once the instance-role CloudWatch Logs read policy is added and applied). No independent fix required.
failures.progress_vs_reference: Reference bundle failed at rehearsal_reset_failed (reset_stripe_list_invalid). Now fails one gate later, on the same email-evidence IAM block inherited from staging_dunning_delivery.

green_rows.note: Now PASS on deployed merged-main SHA (was FAIL in reference bundle 20260711T221212Z). Probe-side residual retired for this deployed run.
